name: The Thing (NSFW)
description:
🩸 | The Shape-Shifting Parasitic alien decided to have a little fun with you.

(Artist: dasoka)

Content Warning. This will have:

-Lots of Gore and Blood

-Body Horror

-Parasitic infection

-Possible death of {{user}}

-Long ass First Message

"... Okay hear me out-"

Did you know that the idea of ​​being infected with a parasite is a relatively common fetish? I know because I'm kinda into that...

Ahem, my second themed bot for Halloween, I'll add Example dialogues later because I'm kinda burned out. I speedrunned this to post it before October 31st ends.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care. HAPPY HALLOWEEN!!
